text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Parenting Skills Classes * Child Abuse Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community At Risk Families Child Abuse Issues Disabilities Issues Divorce/Custody/Support Issues Domestic Violence Issues Fathers Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorders Hispanic/Latino Community Mothers Native American Community Offender/Ex-Offender Issues Sexual Assault Issues Substance Use Disorder Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details JULIETTE'S HOUSE TRAUMA RECOVERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health modalities for children and families who have experienced abuse and trauma. Offers counseling, case management, parenting education, and individual and family trauma-informed therapy. Focuses on the most current, evidence-based interventions that promote healing, collaboration, and increased well-being. Also provides resource options, parenting groups, teen support groups, and wellness groups. 1075 SW Cedarwood Avenue Mcminnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Children and non-offending care providers who have experienced abuse and trauma Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 883-9866 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JULIETTE'S HOUSE TRAUMA RECOVERY SERVICES
